name: SEO Intelligence Hub — Competitive Analysis Scheduler

nodes.name: Load Keyword Watchlist
nodes.notes: In production: replace with Google Sheets or Airtable fetch. For demo: fetch from a static JSON with the keywords to monitor.

nodes.name: Split Keywords
nodes.notes: Process one keyword at a time to respect SerpApi rate limits.

nodes.name: Fetch SERP Results
nodes.notes: Calls SerpApi for each keyword. Free tier: 100 searches/month. Results include top-10 organic URLs, titles, snippets.

nodes.name: Claude Gap Analysis
nodes.notes: Calls Claude Haiku for fast, cost-efficient gap analysis. Each call costs ~$0.001. LangSmith tracing is enabled via the Python agent — n8n calls are also logged separately.

nodes.name: Send Email Report
nodes.notes: Uses SendGrid (free tier: 100 emails/day). Configure credentials in n8n Credentials → SendGrid API.

nodes.name: Slack Notification
nodes.notes: Optional: sends a Slack summary to the team channel when each report is ready.
